exportDimensions: Export 3200x2000 px (~2x). CSS reference frame ≈ 1600x1000 px. All original-pixel measurements below are divided by 2 for CSS px.
layoutSummary: Two-zone app shell: a fixed left sidebar (~272px CSS wide, white) and a scrolling main content area on a very light grey canvas (#F9FAFB / #F6F6F6). The main area stacks vertically: a top bar (page title left + Live Support / bell / avatar right), a horizontal tab strip with a purple active underline, a page header (H2 + description), a 4-up stat-card row, a full-width search input, a horizontal row of filter pills + a Filters dropdown pinned right, and a sortable data table with header row and severity/status badge cells. Content has generous left/right padding (~40px CSS) and the sidebar sits flush to the left edge with a subtle right hairline divider. A yellow 'Upgrade Plan' promo card is pinned to the sidebar bottom.

sections.name: Sidebar - Brand + Team
sections.description: White fixed sidebar. Top: PureVPN logo (purple rounded-square gradient mark with white swoosh + 'purevpn' wordmark in near-black lowercase). Below, a 'Team Name' caption label over 'Bending Spoons' team name. A thin full-width hairline divider separates this block from the nav. A small circular collapse toggle (chevron-left in a white circle with border) floats on the sidebar's right edge, vertically aligned with the team block.
sections.notes: Logo mark uses purple gradient (#7C30F7 -> #5B3DF5 family). 'Team Name' is a small muted grey caption; team name is bold near-black.

sections.name: Sidebar - Primary Navigation
sections.description: Vertical list of nav items, each = 20px icon + label. Top group (muted/grey, inactive): Dashboard, Setup VPN, Downloads, Manual Configuration. Then a divider. Active item 'Identity Protection' rendered in a rounded rectangular pill with a very light lavender fill (#ECE8FF-ish) and a purple left accent bar flush to the sidebar edge, icon + label in brand purple. Below: Remove my Data, Password Manager (these appear active-dark near-black). Divider. Lower group (grey): Profile Settings, Subscription, Feedback.
sections.layout: vertical list, ~14-16px row vertical padding, icon-gap ~12px
components: Active pill with left accent bar
sections.notes: Active state = lavender pill fill + 2-3px purple left bar bleeding off the left edge + purple icon/text. Inactive top items are noticeably lighter grey (disabled feel) than the near-black Remove my Data / Password Manager rows.

sections.name: Sidebar - Upgrade Plan promo
sections.description: Pinned to sidebar bottom: full-width soft-yellow card (#FFC668/#FFE300 tint, ~#FFF3D6 fill) with a gold crown icon, 'Upgrade Plan' label in amber/brown, and a small rounded '-20%' discount chip on the right.
sections.notes: Warm amber text (#B7883B), pale yellow rounded card, small pill chip for the discount.

sections.name: Top Bar
sections.description: Spans the main content width. Left: page title 'Identity theft protection' as a large bold near-black H1. Right cluster: a chat/smiley icon + 'Live Support' text link, a bell notification icon with a small red unread dot, and a circular avatar with 'SA' initials on a light lavender fill.
sections.notes: Avatar fill is pale lavender with purple initials. Bell dot is pure red (#FF0000/#FE2E2E).

sections.name: Tab Strip
sections.description: Horizontal row of 5 tabs, each = 20px outline icon + label: Threat overview (shield), Monitored assets (stacked layers), Employee exposure (people - ACTIVE), Domain squatting (link), Alerts & settings (gear). Active tab 'Employee exposure' has near-black bold text and a thick purple underline bar directly beneath it; inactive tabs are dark-grey/near-black with lighter weight and no underline. A full-width light hairline runs under the whole strip.
sections.layout: horizontal, evenly spaced with gaps (~48px between tabs)
sections.notes: Active underline is ~3px CSS, brand indigo #5B3DF5, sitting on top of the grey hairline divider that spans the full content width.

sections.name: Page Header
sections.description: H2 'Employee exposure' in bold near-black, with a one-line grey description below: 'Details on employee exposure including identified risks and current mitigation measures.'

sections.name: Stat Cards Row
sections.description: 4 equal-width white cards in a row with gaps. Each card: a small label with an info (i) circle icon to its right, and a very large bold number beneath. Cards: 'Total records' 256, 'Employee records' 182, 'Distinct emails' 150, 'Infected machines' 32. The first three numbers are near-black; the fourth (Infected machines / 32) is red to signal alarm.
sections.notes: Cards are white with ~16px CSS radius, very soft shadow, generous internal padding (~28-32px). Numbers are ~44-48px CSS heavy weight. 'Infected machines' number is #FF0000/#FE2E2E red; its label stays grey. Info icon is a thin grey circled-i.

sections.name: Search Bar
sections.description: Full-width rounded search input with a leading magnifier icon and grey placeholder 'Search records'. White fill, subtle border, pill-ish large radius.
sections.notes: Large radius (~28-30px CSS, almost pill), thin light-grey border, generous vertical padding (~14px).

sections.name: Filter Pills Row
sections.description: Horizontal row of toggle filter pills with counts. 'All (85)' is ACTIVE with a pale lavender fill and purple text/border. Others are default (white fill, grey border, dark text): Combo lists (10), Exposed creds (5), Exposed cards (5), Infostealer (20), Phished (10), Exfiltrated (5), Unclassified (30). Pinned to the far right is a 'Filters' dropdown button with a chevron-down.
sections.layout: horizontal wrap/scroll row, space-between with Filters pinned right
sections.notes: Active pill 'All (85)' = lavender fill #ECE8FF, purple text/hairline border #7C2FF7, pill radius. Inactive pills = white, ~1px #EEECEC border, near-black label, fully rounded.

sections.name: Data Table
sections.description: Full-width sortable table. Header row on a very light grey band (#F6F6F6) with a leading select-all checkbox then uppercase grey column labels: TYPE, SOURCE, SOURCE TYPE, SEVERITY, STATUS, DATE ADDED, with a sort (up/down arrows) glyph at the right of DATE ADDED. Body rows separated by light hairlines. Each row: checkbox; TYPE cell = person name (bold near-black) over their email (grey, smaller); SOURCE = plain text (RockYou2024, SWVL Breach, Indolj Breach); SOURCE TYPE = a light-grey rounded chip ('Combo List', 'Exposed creds'); SEVERITY = a soft badge with a colored dot ('Medium' yellow, 'High' orange/red); STATUS = a lavender 'Open' badge with a chevron (dropdown); DATE ADDED = plain grey date 'May 15th, 2026'. Visible rows: Faheem A., John Doe, Sarah Chen, Bilal Naiyer.
sections.notes: Header band is #F6F6F6 with slightly rounded top. Row hairlines ~1px #EEECEC. Checkboxes are square with small radius, light border, unchecked. Column widths approx: Type wide, others medium, Date right-of-center.

typography.role: H2 / section title (Employee exposure, stat numbers use bigger)

reusableComponents.description: 20px icon + label row, optional active pill (lavender fill + purple left accent bar + purple text/icon)
reusableComponents.variants: default (near-black), muted/disabled (light grey), active (lavender pill + left bar)

reusableComponents.name: StatCard
reusableComponents.description: White rounded card: label + info icon, then big KPI number
reusableComponents.variants: neutral (near-black number), alert (red number, e.g. Infected machines)

reusableComponents.name: Tab
reusableComponents.description: icon + label with active purple underline

reusableComponents.name: FilterPill
reusableComponents.variants: active (lavender fill / purple border+text), default (white / grey border)

reusableComponents.name: SeverityBadge
reusableComponents.description: soft-tinted pill with leading colored dot + label
reusableComponents.variants: Medium (yellow dot #FFE300 on pale-yellow), High (orange/red dot #FF5C47 on pale-orange), (implied Low/Critical)

reusableComponents.name: StatusBadge
reusableComponents.description: lavender pill with label + chevron acting as inline dropdown
reusableComponents.variants: Open (lavender/purple); likely Resolved/Ignored variants in other colors

reusableComponents.name: SourceTypeChip
reusableComponents.description: neutral light-grey rounded chip for taxonomy label
reusableComponents.variants: Combo List, Exposed creds, etc. (single grey style)

reusableComponents.name: Button - Filters dropdown
reusableComponents.description: white bordered button with label + chevron-down

reusableComponents.name: SearchInput
reusableComponents.description: large-radius input with leading magnifier icon + placeholder

reusableComponents.name: IconButton
reusableComponents.description: bare icon action (bell w/ dot, live support, collapse toggle)

reusableComponents.name: TableRow
reusableComponents.description: identity two-line cell + text cells + badge cells

reusableComponents.name: DataTable header
reusableComponents.description: grey band, uppercase labels, sort toggle

charts: No charts on this screen. Data visualization is limited to KPI stat cards (big numbers) and colored severity/status badges. (Sibling 'Threat overview' tab likely holds the charts.)

assetsNeeded.note: Purple rounded-square gradient (#7C30F7->#5B3DF5) with white swoosh/shield glyph

assetsNeeded.note: shield, stacked layers, people, link/chain, gear

fidelityNotes: Border radii: stat cards & table container ~16px CSS; pills/badges fully rounded (999px); search input ~28-30px (near-pill); source-type chips ~8px; sidebar active pill ~10-12px; discount chip ~999px.
Shadows: stat cards use a very soft, low-opacity ambient shadow (roughly 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.04-0.06)); table has an even subtler lift. Nothing heavy.
Active tab underline is a solid ~3px CSS indigo bar (#5B3DF5) overlapping the full-width grey hairline (#EEECEC) below the tab strip.
Sidebar active nav = lavender fill (#ECE8FF) pill PLUS a ~3px purple (#7C2FF7) accent bar bleeding off the left content edge — the bar is outside the pill's rounded corner.

Badge tints are low-saturation washes of their dot color: Medium = pale yellow bg with saturated #FFE300 dot; High = pale peach/orange bg with #FF5C47/#FFB454 dot; Open status = pale lavender (#ECE8FF) with purple text.
KPI red (#FE2E2E/#FF0000) is used ONLY for the alarming 'Infected machines' number; label stays neutral grey — do not tint the whole card.
Canvas vs card contrast is very subtle: page bg ~#F9FAFB/#F6F6F6, cards pure white #FFFFFF, table header band #F6F6F6. Keep borders as ~1px #EEECEC hairlines, not dark.
Logo mark gradient is diagonal purple; wordmark is near-black (#191D25).
Info-circle, search magnifier, and sort glyphs are thin 1.5px stroke grey (#637381/#8C8C8C).
Collapse toggle is a small white circle with a 1px grey border and a light shadow, half-overlapping the sidebar's right divider.
Row separators are single hairlines only (no vertical grid lines); table reads airy with ~20-24px CSS row vertical padding.
interactions: Tabs: click switches active tab, moves the purple underline; content region swaps.
Filter pills: single-select toggle (active = lavender). 'All (85)' currently active; counts update the table.
Filters dropdown: opens an advanced filter panel/menu (chevron rotates).
Search input: live-filters table records; focus state raises border to purple.
Table header sort: DATE ADDED (and likely other cols) toggle asc/desc via the sort glyph; header may highlight active sort column.
Select-all checkbox in header toggles all row checkboxes (indeterminate state when partial).
Row checkboxes: multi-select for bulk actions.
Status badge 'Open': is a dropdown (chevron) to change record status (Open/Resolved/Ignored).
Info (i) icons on stat cards: hover tooltip explaining each metric.
Sidebar collapse toggle: collapses sidebar to icon-only rail.
Bell: opens notifications; red dot indicates unread.
Row hover: subtle background tint; likely a copy-email affordance on the identity cell hover.
Upgrade Plan card: click routes to billing/upgrade.
responsiveNotes: Desktop (shown): fixed ~272px sidebar + fluid content; stat cards 4-up; table shows all 7 columns. Tablet (~1024px): sidebar collapsible to an icon rail (toggle already present); stat cards drop to 2x2; filter pills become a horizontally scrollable row; table may hide SOURCE TYPE or condense DATE. Mobile (<640px): sidebar becomes an off-canvas drawer behind a hamburger; top bar keeps logo + avatar, moves Live Support into a menu; page title scales down (~24-26px); stat cards stack 1-per-row (or 2-up scroll); tabs become a horizontally scrollable segmented strip; search full-width; filter pills scroll horizontally with Filters as an icon button; the data table collapses into stacked cards per record (name+email header, then Source/Severity/Status/Date as labeled key-value rows) since 7 columns won't fit. Maintain 16px gutters on mobile, 40px on desktop.
